options.content:
## Moqui Parameter Editor

This dashboard is focused on the `Parameter` entity defined in `runtime/component/mantle-udm/entity/MathEntities.xml`.

- The main table is read-only because Grafana's built-in table panel does not support inline cell editing.
- To update a row, set `Edit Parameter ID` and the new values in the dashboard variables above.
- Leave a value blank to keep the current value.
- Use `__NULL__` to clear `numericValue`, `symbolicValue`, or `parameterEnumId`.
- Set `Apply Update` to `Y`, refresh the dashboard once, then set it back to `N`.
- The `Selected Parameter` panel applies the update first and then reads the current row.
- Click a `parameter_id` value in the table to reopen this dashboard with that row preselected.

targets.rawSql: WITH input AS (SELECT NULLIF(trim($pid$${edit_parameter_id}$pid$), '') AS parameter_id, trim($num$${edit_numeric_value}$num$) AS numeric_value_raw, trim($sym$${edit_symbolic_value}$sym$) AS symbolic_value_raw, trim($enum$${edit_parameter_enum_id}$enum$) AS parameter_enum_id_raw, trim($apply$${apply_update}$apply$) AS apply_update), upd AS (UPDATE "parameter" p SET "numeric_value" = CASE WHEN i.numeric_value_raw = '' THEN p."numeric_value" WHEN upper(i.numeric_value_raw) = '__NULL__' THEN NULL ELSE i.numeric_value_raw::numeric END, "symbolic_value" = CASE WHEN i.symbolic_value_raw = '' THEN p."symbolic_value" WHEN upper(i.symbolic_value_raw) = '__NULL__' THEN NULL ELSE i.symbolic_value_raw END, "parameter_enum_id" = CASE WHEN i.parameter_enum_id_raw = '' THEN p."parameter_enum_id" WHEN upper(i.parameter_enum_id_raw) = '__NULL__' THEN NULL ELSE i.parameter_enum_id_raw END FROM input i WHERE i.apply_update = 'Y' AND i.parameter_id IS NOT NULL AND p."parameter_id" = i.parameter_id RETURNING p."parameter_id") SELECT p."parameter_id", p."parameter_def_id", pd."parameter_code", pd."parameter_name", pd."parameter_type_enum_id", p."sequence_num", p."numeric_value", p."symbolic_value", p."parameter_enum_id" FROM input i LEFT JOIN upd u ON u."parameter_id" = i."parameter_id" JOIN "parameter" p ON p."parameter_id" = i."parameter_id" JOIN "parameter_def" pd ON pd."parameter_def_id" = p."parameter_def_id"

SELECT CASE WHEN NULLIF(trim($pid$${edit_parameter_id}$pid$), '') IS NULL THEN 'Set Edit Parameter ID first' WHEN trim($apply$${apply_update}$apply$) = 'Y' THEN 'Update requested on refresh. Check Selected Parameter for the persisted values.' ELSE 'Preview only. Set Apply Update = Y and refresh once to persist changes.' END AS status, NULLIF(trim($pid$${edit_parameter_id}$pid$), '') AS parameter_id, NULLIF(trim($num$${edit_numeric_value}$num$), '') AS requested_numeric_value, NULLIF(trim($sym$${edit_symbolic_value}$sym$), '') AS requested_symbolic_value, NULLIF(trim($enum$${edit_parameter_enum_id}$enum$), '') AS requested_parameter_enum_id

SELECT p."parameter_id", p."parameter_def_id", pd."parameter_code", pd."parameter_name", pd."parameter_type_enum_id", p."sequence_num", p."numeric_value", p."symbolic_value", p."parameter_enum_id" FROM "parameter" p JOIN "parameter_def" pd ON pd."parameter_def_id" = p."parameter_def_id" WHERE (trim($search$${parameter_search}$search$) = '' OR lower(p."parameter_id") LIKE lower('%' || trim($search$${parameter_search}$search$) || '%') OR lower(p."parameter_def_id") LIKE lower('%' || trim($search$${parameter_search}$search$) || '%') OR lower(pd."parameter_code") LIKE lower('%' || trim($search$${parameter_search}$search$) || '%') OR lower(pd."parameter_name") LIKE lower('%' || trim($search$${parameter_search}$search$) || '%')) ORDER BY pd."parameter_code", p."parameter_id" LIMIT 500
